title: rosa tomentosa var. velutina
intro: Rosa tomentosa var. velutina, also known as the hairy rose or velvety rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa tomentosa var. velutina include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Rosa tomentosa var. velutina is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
